# Gamma Tech Group

> AI automation, AI implementation, and custom app development for Atlanta-area businesses. We help companies doing $250K+ in annual revenue eliminate operational friction with custom AI agents, software integrations, automation, and purpose-built mobile & web apps.

## About
Gamma Tech Group maps operational workflows, identifies the friction points costing time and money, and deploys a tailored mix of AI agents, software integrations, automation, and custom mobile/web applications to remove them — so teams focus on revenue instead of repetition. Based in Atlanta, GA; serving clients across the United States.

## Services
- AI Agent Development — custom AI agents that autonomously handle real workflows (lead response, sales follow-up, scheduling, back-office ops, document processing, customer support), built into the tools a business already uses and typically live in ~30 days. Details: https://gammatechgroup.com/services/ai-agent-development/
- AI Automation — custom AI agents built around real workflows
- AI Implementation — integrating AI into existing operations and tools
- Business Automation — removing repetitive manual work
- Software Integration — connecting disconnected tools and systems
- Mobile & Web App Development — custom apps with AI and automation built in
- Workflow Consulting — auditing operations and finding bottlenecks

## Service pages
- All services (hub): https://gammatechgroup.com/services/
- AI Agent Development: https://gammatechgroup.com/services/ai-agent-development/ — done-for-you custom AI agent design, build, integration, and maintenance for US businesses. Atlanta-based. Free 30-minute evaluation.
- Software Automation (Business Process Automation): https://gammatechgroup.com/services/software-automation/ — done-for-you business process automation and systems integration: we connect the tools a business already uses (CRM, QuickBooks, Google Workspace, Slack, forms, spreadsheets, e-commerce) and automate the deterministic, rule-based work between them — systems integration, workflow automation, data sync, automated documents & reporting, alerts & handoffs, and internal tools/dashboards. Built with the right mix of no-code (Zapier/Make/n8n) and custom code, monitored, and owned by the client. This is the deterministic "plumbing" (— when X happens, do Y), distinct from AI agents, which handle judgment and open-ended tasks. Atlanta-based, serving the US. Free automation audit.
- Website Development: https://gammatechgroup.com/services/website-development/ — custom website design & development for small and mid-market businesses: fast, mobile-first, SEO-ready, conversion-focused sites (lead-gen, booking, e-commerce, web apps, landing pages, redesigns) with lead capture and booking built in. You own the code and content. Atlanta-based, serving the US. Free 30-minute evaluation.
- App Development: https://gammatechgroup.com/services/app-development/ — done-for-you custom mobile (iOS & Android) and web app development for founders and growing businesses: customer apps, internal tools, client portals, SaaS MVPs, marketplaces, and AI-powered features. One codebase across iOS/Android/web, a real MVP in weeks, and you own the code and IP. Atlanta-based, serving the US. Free 30-minute evaluation.
- Online Presence (Local SEO + AI Search): https://gammatechgroup.com/services/online-presence/ — done-for-you online presence for local/small-mid businesses: Google Business Profile optimization, local near-me SEO, reviews & reputation, listing/brand consistency, social setup, and AI-search visibility (AEO/GEO) so customers find and get recommended you on Google and inside AI assistants (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI). You own every account. Atlanta-based, serving the US. Free visibility audit.
- Engineering on Demand (Staff Augmentation): https://gammatechgroup.com/services/engineering-on-demand/ — on-demand senior software engineering for startups and growing businesses: staff augmentation / embedded senior engineers, a fractional engineering team or fractional CTO, backlog & feature sprint squads, dedicated project squads, and technical rescue of stalled builds. Start in days, scale up or down, US-based and founder-led, and you own the code and IP. Atlanta-based, serving the US. Free technical consult.

## Who it's for
Businesses generating $250K+ in annual revenue that are bottlenecked by manual processes, disconnected software, or admin work that distracts from growth.

## Contact
- Website: https://gammatechgroup.com/
- Email: hello@gammatechgroup.com
- Free evaluation: book via the form on the homepage
